title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 536.043 - Director of social services not required to but may promulgate rules
text:
536.043.  Director of social services not required to but may promulgate rules. — Notwithstanding the provisions of section 189.060, the director of social services shall not be required to promulgate rules provided for in said section, although he may elect to do so as therein provided.
(L. 1975 S.B. 58 § 2) 
Effective 1-01-76
